task_description: Build a full-stack AI-powered video generation web application. Users provide a topic, AI generates a structured script, converts narration to speech via edge-tts, sources related GIFs/stock videos/images from free APIs (Pexels, Pixabay, Giphy), and assembles everything into a final short video (up to 10 minutes). Backend: FastAPI with OpenAI-compatible AI gateway. Frontend: React+Vite+TypeScript with multi-step wizard UI. All AI outputs are user-editable.

verification.summary: All 35 backend tests pass. All 8 frontend tests pass. Frontend builds cleanly (tsc + vite). Both Docker images build successfully (abet-backend, abet-frontend).

review_fixes.summary: Fixed path traversal via regex constraint on video_id, wrapped write_videofile in asyncio.to_thread, added Semaphore(5) for media sourcing concurrency, added try/finally for clip cleanup, added failed_stage assertion to test.
